subcodes.first_line: O God! Thou Who hast shed the effulgent rays of forgiveness upon human temples and hast quickened dormant realities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من اشرق بانوار الغفران علی هیاکل الانسان و احیی الحقائق الخامده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
